title: Flowered Oak Leaves
body:
I added some flowers to the oak leaves, they look super pretty...
The flowers are white, similar to Oxeye daisy or "Margaritas"

**YOU DO NOT NEED OPTIFINE!!!**
It's completely in **vanilla Minecraft**

Las flores son blancas, similares a las "Margaritas"

**NO NECESITAS OPTIFINE!!!**
Es completamente en **Minecraft vanilla**

![...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fe432467962b63ba8996295fee7212da2ff7214.webp)
